craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This gated Condominium Complex is about 15-20 minutes to the Isle of Palms Beach and Downtown Charleston . It is across the street from the Mt. Pleasant Recreation Dept. where there is a Dog Park, softball, baseball, basketball, tennis, an indoor swimming pool, bike and walking trails are located. It's only a mile and a half away from Kohl's, Walmart, Starbucks, Magic Mushroom, & more. My Home has beautiful granite kitchen counter tops and granite bar, stainless steel appliances, washer and dryer, 2 Smart TV's, ground floor unit, Included in Rent (Dishes, pots/pans, coffee pot, blender, Electric, Water, Comcast Cable already turned on, Internet/Wi-fi, and basic furniture. Bedroom has a new King mattress and a nice sized walk in closet. Back porch is screened in and has Amish Poly-wood patio furniture. Condominium complex has a pool, workout room, several tennis courts and an on-site area for car washing /vacuum. Walking distance to Publix, dry cleaning, restaurants, postal store, bank, schools. Hospital is 1.3 miles away. Rent Includes all Utilities and is 2200 a month
